verses.1: Behold, you are beautiful, my love.
verses.2: Your teeth are like a newly shorn flock,
verses.3: Your lips are like scarlet thread.
verses.4: Your neck is like David’s tower built for an armory,
verses.5: Your two breasts are like two fawns
verses.6: Until the day is cool, and the shadows flee away,
verses.7: You are all beautiful, my love.
verses.8: Come with me from Lebanon, my bride,
verses.9: You have ravished my heart, my sister, my bride.
verses.10: How beautiful is your love, my sister, my bride!
verses.11: Your lips, my bride, drip like the honeycomb.
verses.12: My sister, my bride, is a locked up garden;
verses.13: Your shoots are an orchard of pomegranates, with precious fruits,
verses.16: Awake, north wind, and come, you south!
